name: ABBYY Development Inc.
h1: ABBYY Development's GCC footprint in India
lede: ABBYY Development runs two centers across two Indian cities. Bengaluru and New Delhi, covering R&D and CoE, built over two years.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one ABBYY Development office in India. We map two, across two cities, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.
metaTitle: ABBYY Development Inc. GCC in India: Centers, Footprint & Leaders | Bamboo Reports
metaDescription: ABBYY Development runs 2 verified centers across 2 Indian cities (Bengaluru, New Delhi), covering R&D and CoE. See the full India footprint, org map and contacts on Bamboo Reports.

titles.title: Director, Global Business Operations & Site Head (India)

about.description: ABBYY Development's India footprint covers Bengaluru and New Delhi, spanning R&D and CoE. The centers deliver IT for the group's global operations.

bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all one decision-makers, in one profile.
